rows.body: Hi {{first_name}}, this is Mykoal DeShazo with Adaxa Home (NMLS 1912347). You asked about buying a home at smartr8.com. I can get you pre approved. Reply STOP to opt out, HELP for help.
{{first_name}}, a strong pre approval helps you shop in your range and make offers sellers take seriously. Want me to get you started?
Tell me where you are looking and your rough budget, {{first_name}}, and let us run your numbers for a pre approval.

rows.subject: Buying your first home or your next one
rows.preheader: We guide first time buyers and move up buyers through every step.
rows.body:
However you are buying, I am here to make it simple. First time buyers get clear guidance and programs that fit. Move up buyers get help lining up the timing so it works. And every offer is backed by a clean, well prepared file.

Reply and tell me your goal and let us run your numbers.
{{first_name}}, first time buyer or moving up, I walk you through every step in plain language. Happy to answer any questions.
Still getting ready, {{first_name}}? When you are set I can size up your pre approval fast. Reply STOP to opt out.

rows.subject: Ready when you are, {{first_name}}
rows.preheader: Your pre approval is a quick conversation away.
rows.body:
House hunting takes time. Whenever you want to get pre approved or refresh your numbers, I can turn it around quickly.

Call or text me anytime at (480) 206 9290.
{{first_name}}, I will keep your purchase request on file. Reach me anytime at (480) 206 9290. Reply STOP to opt out. Mykoal.
